title: Listening - Part 4
description: You will hear five short extracts in which people are talking about their experience of learning something new. Complete both tasks.

task1.instruction: Task 1: For questions 1-5, choose from the list (A-H) what motivated each speaker to take up the activity.

questions.speaker: Speaker 1
questions.explanation: Speaker 1 mentions a lifelong dream from childhood.

questions.speaker: Speaker 2
questions.explanation: Speaker 2 says a friend told them about it.

questions.speaker: Speaker 4
questions.explanation: Speaker 4 needed it for their job.

task2.instruction: Task 2: For questions 6-10, choose from the list (A-H) how each speaker felt about the experience of learning.

questions.speaker: Speaker 2
questions.explanation: Speaker 2 was surprised by how quickly they improved.

questions.speaker: Speaker 3
questions.explanation: Speaker 3 felt motivated to keep going.

questions.speaker: Speaker 4
questions.explanation: Speaker 4 expresses pride in their accomplishment.

questions.speaker: Speaker 5
questions.explanation: Speaker 5 found it more difficult than expected.
